Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to produce Python code that constructs a Petri net for the described insurance claim process Must include places transitions arcs initial marking final marking Use pm4py objects and utils Provide code

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to represent states start C maybe Claim Received Then after CR to DV DV maybe to RDS if incomplete So we need a place after DV that leads to RDS and RDS back to DV Also FC to CA but FC may loop to II multiple times before CA So we need a place after FC that leads to II and II back to FC Also need place after CA to AP then AP to P Simplify after CA go to AP then to P Also after P to N to CL

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: We can assume that after CA there is a decision if amount greater than threshold then AP else maybe direct to P or maybe AP is required always Simplify after CA go to AP then to P

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Lets design places p_start claim just filed new claim p_cr after claim registration p_dv after document verification p_rds re document submission p_fc after fraud check p_ii in depth investigation p_ca claim assessment p_ap approval p_p payment p_n notification p_cl closure

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Transitions t_cr from p_start to p_cr CR t_dv from p_cr to p_dv DV t_rds from p_dv to p_rds if documents incomplete Re Document Submission t_rds_back from p_rds to p_dv after resubmission t_fc from p_dv to p_fc FC t_ii from p_fc to p_ii In depth Investigation t_ii_back from p_ii to p_fc after investigation t_ca from p_fc to p_ca CA if no further investigation t_ca2 from p_ii to p_ca t_ap from p_ca to p_ap AP t_p from p_ap to p_p P t_n from p_p to p_n N t_cl from p_n to p_cl CL

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to ensure that the net is sound initial token in p_start final token in p_cl The final marking should have token in p_cl closed claim

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Define initial marking im token in p_start only Define final marking fm token in p_cl only However we need to ensure that there is a path from im to fm which there is

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to import from pm4py.objects.petri_net.obj import PetriNet Marking Place Transition and from pm4py.objects.petri_net.utils import petri_utils

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: In pm4py Place and Transition objects are created via PetriNet Place and PetriNet Transition or imported classes and then added to net via net places add and net transitions add

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We might also need to ensure that the final marking is reachable from initial marking which is the case
